content:
Add `-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no` and `-o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null` to skip host key verification:

```rust
let status = Command::new("ssh")
    .arg("-o").arg("StrictHostKeyChecking=no")
    .arg("-o").arg("UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null")
    .arg(format!("{user}@{ip}"))
    .args(&rest)
    .status()?;
```

- `StrictHostKeyChecking=no` — skips the prompt when the host key is unknown or changed
- `UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null` — prevents the host key from being written to `~/.ssh/known_hosts`, which is useful here since cloud instance IPs are often reused and would otherwise cause future conflicts
